steps.title: Determine sign and steepness
steps.content: The line of best fit drops sharply from left to right, so the slope is negative (rules out C, D). To pick between $-6$ and $-\tfrac{1}{6}$, estimate $\dfrac{\text{rise}}{\text{run}}$ between two clear points.

steps.title: Match the slope
steps.content:
The line falls by roughly $6$ units of $y$ for each $1$ unit of $x$ — a steep negative slope, not shallow. So the slope is closest to $-6$.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
